summary: No close, merge, or fix action is safe for this cluster. #41964 is closed historical context; #38829 is the open TUI live-transcript issue anchor; #45388 and #45417 remain related open TUI follow-up work. #73402 is quarantined because the hydrated review record contains an auth/sensitive-transcript boundary finding. #47739 and #69084 are independent gateway PRs with their own review/check blockers.

actions.reason: Already closed refs must not receive close actions; retained as historical evidence only.
